item.title: I'm in the wrong business
item.description: Aydan Conrad, a Twitch streamer and a Fortnite professional player decided to surprise his mother by paying off all of her remaining student loans. Good on you Aydan!
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Images of Note: Acid horse
item.description:
Ok but it slaps though
I mean it works.
It's because the media largely supports the Tories.
give it back.
that looks comfy
The idea of forcing teenagers, who largely wake up later, to go to school at the part of the day where they're least able to learn will never fail to horrify me.
Well.
What
Oh no.
Whee
It's always valid to Deez Nuts the Taliban
I need this for Eric
Yeah this is Spock
AAAAAAAAAAAA
The more I learn about what is happening in Windows the more I'm happy I switched to Linux Mint.
Well this is....a good way to promote organ donation.
Look at them, they're enthralled.
Amazing
https://www.tumblr.com/yamujiburo Jessie x Delia is the best ship
Do not underestimate the determination of toddlers.
Oh my my
You joke but...
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For Streams: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: This is not ok! Can we please teach young people that no means no, you don't own another human being, it doesn't matter married or not. No you are not entitled to sex!
item.description: It's scary that this still has to be said. If you're someone who's grown up hearing this shit, please know it's 100% wrong!!!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Fallout atomic mega dump (part 3)
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Feeling hope
item.description: I’m finally leaving a covert narcissist (I’d been tricked into having her last name). My parents disowned me after I got married (not that they cared about me anyway. They just wanted to keep control for themselves). So, I decided to choose a completely new name but was worried because it’s a feminine name. Completely surprised that friends and even strangers in my life have been so supportive. Of course ex is not supportive. I get compliments on my painted nails and everyone has asked my pronouns and how to pronounce my new name. Social security office even asked if I wanted to change my gender marker.
item.dc:creator: MyLittleLily

item.title: Netflix at one time almost beat piracy. That’s how good the deal used to be
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: My Shadowheart Cosplay from BG3 - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hello everyone :) Today I'd like to share more pics of my Shadowheart Cosplay, last time I posted about my Shadowheart people complained about my selfie mirror videos saying it looks bad and awkward and that I should have a photographer take pictures instead, but I do actually!!! ? so I wanted to share the pics I took with my photographer this time! (his IG for reference : https://instagram.com/neroburn_art he's also an artist!) I think videos are cool too sometimes, shows that I'm a real moving person and not just a static picture haha so I like to post both to show different aspects of my work. And mirror videos also convey a sense of closeness, I enjoy seeing cosplayers mirror selfies cause it feels like real people too! What do you think? :) Pics by Neroburn Wig and hair accessories handmade by me Source: https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Cat Dump 2: More Meows for You
item.description:
Impossible.
Ojos is the Spanish for eyes. This kitty has no ojos - Nojos!
Me two hours after a gummy.
This cat is a demigod of some sort.
Me too, Cheesecake.
I recommend James the Totally Real Human on Facebook for cat-themed Simpsons memes.
Cat tax: We brought our sunflower out for coffee.

item.title: All State is whack
item.description: Even the police report didn’t fault me for anything. The letter this guy’s insurance company sent me was like “We find that (my name) was partially liable for the accident by %. Here’s $700 for a rental.” They didn’t even write what % I was supposedly liable for lol. My brother sent them a terrifying letter threatening to sue and they instantly changed their mind.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.description: Google Translate: Master craftsman
item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: I’m gonna make you love me
item.description: Ever since I got back from being out of the country a couple of days ago, foster kitten Espresso has been pretty stand-offish. She’ll let me pet her, and she’s curious about my lap, but she runs from me when I walk towards her and shies away from my hand. But I sat still for a while tonight and she came right to me. Oooh, baby Girl, imma make you love me!! And isn’t she GORGEOUS??
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Latte is King of the quiet meow
item.description: Foster kitten Latte opens his mouth to meow every ten seconds or so. But he only ever actually meows once in a while. He’s got a lot to say, but doesn’t wanna overwhelm me. I very much appreciate that, Latte. I missed you, baby boy.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: How to deal with trolls on social media - advice from Spin Doctors
item.description: Do you remember the song “Two Princes” by the Spin Doctors from the early 90s? The lead singer of the group offered advice on how to deal with trolls on social media. Those that fit the description should prepare to be blocked by GenX and Millennial users who love Threads.
item.dc:creator: nancydrew79

item.title: sorry not sorry
item.description: literally shares this shit multiple times a day across various accounts, and its not even their kid. I tried muting the person they were sharing the post from, still appeared. muted the person I know, saw it on their insta. so I went and voted for the competition. on my phone and my computer
